video_title: AI: sinkhole crater beside the wick in a jar candle

seconds.vision_desc: Top-down extreme close-up of a glass jar candle, deep sinkhole crater sunk into smooth cream wax beside the dark wick, warm raking light
slow dolly in over the jar rim, the crater walls and crumbled wax texture around the wick sharpening into focus
camera drifts closer, crater cavity beside the wick dominates the frame, warm bokeh background
extreme close-up of the sinkhole crater and wick, crumbled wax fragments on the surface
the wick stub stands at the crater edge, deep cavity shadow visible, warm light
a small flame ignites on the wick beside the crater, warm glow spreading over the wax top
burning wick beside the sinkhole crater, flame steady, melted sheen forming
close-up of the lit candle, flame above the crater-pocked cream wax top

windows.embed_text: deep sinkhole crater sunk into smooth cream wax beside the wick of a glass jar candle, slow dolly in over the rim, crater walls in warm light, wick ignites in final seconds
